purpose: Define an attended DevHub read-only preflight packet from committed guardrail API compatibility v6 fixtures and synthetic DevHub surface fixtures only, without live DevHub access.

source_fixtures.consumed_for: guardrail response compatibility and exact offline validation command expectations
synthetic DevHub surface categories, selectors, validation-message classes, and read-only stop reasons

manual_login_handoff_prerequisites.requirement: Any later DevHub observation requires a visible, attended browser controlled by the user for a user-owned account.
The user must manually complete sign-in, MFA, CAPTCHA, security prompts, account recovery, or access troubleshooting if those paths appear.
The operator must confirm the surface is read-only before any future accessible-structure capture begins.

refused_paths.reason: CAPTCHA handling is a user-only access prompt.
MFA and security prompts must be completed manually by the user.
Account creation and registration paths are outside this read-only preflight packet.
Official actions are consequential and excluded from read-only preflight.

redaction_requirements.requirement: Replace names, addresses, permit numbers, application numbers, emails, phone numbers, account identifiers, and visible private values with typed synthetic placeholders.
Do not capture file names, document titles, thumbnails, links, downloaded files, or attachment metadata from account-scoped pages.
Capture only accessible roles, labels, landmarks, headings, validation-message categories, and read-only stop reasons as synthetic metadata.

timeout_abort_criteria.abort_when: The user has not reached a read-only account page within the operator-approved window.
The next visible path requires filling, upload, submission, certification, payment, scheduling, cancellation, or account creation.
A page requires opening, downloading, or reading private documents or attachments.

post_capture_review_placeholders.placeholder: Reviewer confirms synthetic accessible-structure rows contain no private values or browser artifacts.
Reviewer confirms each future captured row maps to an allowed read-only page category.
Reviewer confirms refused CAPTCHA, MFA, account-creation, upload, submit, certify, payment, and scheduling paths were not automated.
